title: Stronger Agents with LangChain and LangGraph
tagline: Turn the hand-wired agent into a typed LangGraph with streaming and explicit state.

story.problem: The first three cookbooks prove the Nebius integration path, but the agent logic is still mostly a linear request handler with hand-wired state transitions.
story.solution: Rebuild the agent loop as a LangGraph state graph: named nodes plan, retrieve or use tools, and write the final answer while graph events stream back to the route.
story.outcome: A stronger agent skeleton that can grow into durable execution, persistent context, interrupts, evaluators, and guardrails without turning the FastAPI route into orchestration glue.

endpoints.description: Run the agent against a user prompt and stream SSE events back.
